security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost data: blob:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost ws://127.0.0.1:8765 http://127.0.0.1:8765; font-src 'self' data:; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'; form-action 'self'

bundle.longDescription: SindriCAD, a parametric CAD app for 3D printing.
